problems.name: Multi-window SLO burn rate
problems.risk: A single incident can consume error budget faster than aggregate monthly dashboards show.

problems.name: Automated canary rollback decision
problems.risk: A bad model or service version can look acceptable in aggregate traffic until the rollout expands.

problems.name: Trace completeness and cardinality audit
problems.risk: Telemetry can exist but still be unusable because key attributes are missing or too high-cardinality.

problems.name: Collector outage and queue resilience
problems.risk: Collector/exporter backpressure can silently drop traces during the exact window an incident needs evidence.

problems.name: Incident correlation and deduplication
problems.risk: Latency, dependency, rollout, and telemetry symptoms create separate alerts for one operator-facing incident.
